_comment: Tier-2 for Kratos heat#0: TEMPERATURE must be added to ModelPart variables list before any Node. Accessing it via GetSolutionStepValue raises 'variables list doesn't have this variable: TEMPERATURE' from variables_list_data_value_container. Same family as fluid#0 (VELOCITY) and linear_elasticity#9. Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
